field_notes.flags: Primitive booleans packed by official codec; does not prove initialized player ability semantics.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound player_abilities packet framing and dispatch/decode for one flags/speed fixture only; do not infer initialized player ability semantics, movement readiness, render readiness, or client-load completion.
